Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface ValidationFailure

All Known Implementing Classes:
ValidationFailureImpl
public interface ValidationFailure
A failed validation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    <E extends Exception>
    E    		 createException​(Class<E> type)
    Creates an exception containing the failure message.
    Class<? extends Exception> getExceptionType()
    Returns the type of exception associated with the failure.
    String getMessage()
    Returns the message associated with the failure.

  • Method Details

    • getMessage

      String getMessage()
      Returns the message associated with the failure.
      Returns:
      the message associated with the failure
      See Also:
      ThreadRequirements.getContext(), Configuration.getContext()

    • getExceptionType

      Class<? extends Exception> getExceptionType()
      Returns the type of exception associated with the failure.
      Returns:
      the type of exception associated with the failure

    • createException

      <E extends Exception> E createException​(Class<E> type)
      Creates an exception containing the failure message.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the type of the exception
      Parameters:
      type - the type of the exception
      Returns:
      the exception corresponding to the validation failure
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if type is null
